arts.ttl: Legends of KV Mechelen’s 120 years: Michel Preud’homme
arts.sum: This December, KV Mechelen are celebrating their 120th anniversary. Alongside an overview of the clubs fascinating history, we are profiling some of the legends of the clubs history. One of…

arts.ttl: From Michel Preud’homme to Rob Schoofs: Celebrating 120 years of KV Mechelen
arts.sum: KV Mechelen celebrate their 120th anniversary today. During that time, the club have won trophies, been relegated and seen themselves embroiled in a match fixing scandal that rocked Belgian football.…
